title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleRomaji: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

tags.name: Office
tags.description: Features people who work in a business office.

tags.name: Work
tags.description: Centers around the activities of a certain occupation.

chapterSourceTitle: Koppa Mai Chiru - Sono Koro ni

title: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleRomaji: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleNative: 現実世界でも幸せにしてくださいね？
synonyms: Be Happy in the Real World Too, Okay?
synopsis: High school girl Machino, who longs for the "love of destiny," loves to play the dating-sim game "Celestia." Despite maximizing the affection with all of the girls in the game, she can't decide on which one to choose for the confession event. After agonizing over the decision for days, an explosion occurs just as a shooting star flies over her house, and when Machino opens her eyes, she finds herself face to face with Sofia, the main heroine of Celestia.... "Machino... I always wanted to say it... I love you." An isekai summoning yuri harem romantic comedy begins, as her highly affectionate heroines jump into the real world! (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

Job Changing for the Entire Population: The Jobless Me Will Terminate the Gods
Tôi – Kẻ vô chức đã diệt thần
I'm A Loser And I Killed The Gods
synopsis: Facing a calamity that left chaos and destruction in its wake, mankind's survival was hanging in the balance. The only solution? Get a job and get good! Some became mages, other summoners. However, Cloud, a promising student with a great future ahead of him refused to get a job! Being jobless is his true calling! (Source: WebComics)

title: The Otome Heroine's Fight for Survival (Manga)
titleRomaji: Otome Game no Heroine de Saikyou Survival @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Otome Heroine's Fight for Survival (Manga)
titleNative: 乙女ゲームのヒロインで最強サバイバル@COMIC
synopsis: After losing her parents at a young age to a monster attack on their village, Alicia is sent to an orphanage, where she spends three miserable years being mistreated—and doing her best to smile through it all. After finally reaching her limit and running away, Alicia is attacked by a strange woman who wants to take the young girl’s place as the protagonist of something called an otome game. During the struggle, Alicia accidentally absorbs part of the woman’s memories and knowledge, transforming her from a scared child to a calculated young woman with a mission: to write her own destiny. Now adrift in an unforgiving world, Alicia vows to grow stronger by any means necessary. She’ll need all the might she can muster if she has any hope of changing her fate and fighting for survival. (Source: J-Novel Club)

titleNative: 初見先輩は補欠
synopsis: "I wouldn't mind trying it with you, senpai." Hatsumi, a third-year substitute on the baseball team, flinches everytime at the slightly excessive skinship from Hinaki, a second-year regular. One day, however, Hatsumi witnesses Hinaki kissing another member of the club and begins to feel unsettled. A sensitive BL between a senior who is always an substitute and a junior who is a regular. (Source: East Press, translated) Note: Includes one extra chapter.

titleRomaji: Saikyou Shoukanshi wa Arasa Ossan: Card wo Oya ni Shobun sareta Card Gamer no Isekai Musou
titleNative: 最強召喚士はアラサーおっさん 〜カードを親に処分されたカードゲーマーの異世界無双〜
synopsis: The story follows Sousaku Kamifuda, an otaku around his 30s, who is fully indulging in his trading card game hobby. In the midst of his mother selling the entirety of his precious card collection, the man is transported to another world. Using his card game skills, he attempts to find a way back home. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Over Rev!
titleRomaji: Over Rev!
titleNative: オーバーレブ!
synonyms: A Legend of Ultimate Hot Rodder
synopsis: Ryoko's life used to revolve around track but due to an injury she can no longer follow the path she hoped to. One day while out with her friends, she witnesses two cars racing and gets caught up in the excitement, especially after realizing the one driver is a young woman like herself! When a chance arrives for her to try drifting, she dives right in, even though she's never driven a car before. Suddenly, she has a new passion... and a lot to learn. (Source: Shogakukan, translated)

titleNative: 竜伐のフィエラ
synonyms: Fiera the Dragonslayer
synopsis: The Kingdom of Swordland was reduced to ashes in a single night by a dragon that appeared out of nowhere. Princess Fiera, who lost her homeland and family before her very eyes, rises up to slay her sworn enemy, the calamity known as the "dragon," while bearing her brother's will and the unvoiced grief of the people on her still young shoulders!

title: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleRomaji: Watashi wo Suki Sugiru Yuusha-sama wo Riyoushite, Konse koso Nagaikisuru Tsumori datta noni (Tabun, Mata Shippaishita)
titleNative: 私を好きすぎる勇者様を利用して、今世こそ長生きするつもりだったのに（多分、また失敗した）
synonyms: I’m Using the Hero Who Loves Me Too Much, Because I Planned to Live a Long Life in This World (I Probably Failed Again)
synopsis: "Please, use me as you wish." Lizette, a count's daughter, is a "Recaller" who remembers her previous lives, and she is now on her fourth life. In her past lives, always on her 20th birthday, she would be killed and eaten by the same demon. So to live a long life this time, Lizette retreated to a remote countryside sanctuary, where monsters don't appear, living quietly and peacefully. But one day she met Ralph, a boy she saved in her childhood. Somehow, he had become the country's hero by defeating a demon lord. If she could stay by Ralph's side, she might not have to die this time... With this in mind, Lizette accepted his proposal. "I will protect you, Lisette-sama, even if it costs me my life." While bewildered by Ralph's exceedingly heavy affection, Lizette uncovers the truth behind her repeating deaths. Will Lizette be able to live pass her 20th birthday unharmed this time?! It's the start of a romantic comedy between the heroine who doesn't want to die and the intensely doting yandere hero! (Source: Comic Brise, translated)

title: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleRomaji: Koishita Hito wa, Imouto no Kawari ni Shindekure to Itta.: Imouto to Kekkon Shita Kataomoi Aite ga Naze Imasara Watashi no Moto ni? to Omottara @COMIC
titleEnglish: The Person I Loved Asked Me to Die in My Sister's Stead
titleNative: 恋した人は、妹の代わりに死んでくれと言った。―妹と結婚した片思い相手がなぜ今さら私のもとに？と思ったら―@COMIC
synopsis: Wisteria, the daughter of a count, secretly has feelings for Bright, a beautiful childhood friend and son of a duke who, unable to use magic, had been conducting forbidden research in the shadows. Devastated when Bright confesses his love for her younger sister, Wisteria is even more hurt when he asks her to take her sister's place as a sacrifice. Is her love for Bright so strong that she will give up her life for him? (Source: TOKYOPOP)

title: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleRomaji: Tsuihou Reijou, Craft Shinagara Camping Car de Isekai wo Tabishimasu
titleNative: 追放令嬢、クラフトしながらキャンピングカーで異世界を旅します
synonyms: The Exiled Lady Travels to Another World in a Camper Van While Crafting
synopsis: Riding in a camper, eating delicious food, and enjoying the spectacular view. Saori Furuki was a university student in the engineering department and loved making things. After a car accident, she is reborn as Eline, the daughter of a viscount, However, her family treats her coldly, saying that she is incompetent and can only use magic to produce items, and she is exiled from the country. However, Eline's “alchemy magic” is a magic that has unlimited possibilities when combined with the knowledge from her previous life! Determined to live freely from now on, Eline has created a camper for starters. She can move around, live, and make things as she pleases. Together with Aristy, a martial maid who adores Eline, she begins her adventurous journey with a sense of ease. Eating delicious food, admiring the spectacular scenery, and creating useful things. This is a travel story about riding in a camper and enjoying another world with elegance. (Source: SB Creative, translated)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

title: They Were 11!
titleRomaji: 11-nin Iru!
titleNative: 11人いる!
synonyms: They Were Eleven
Juuichi nin Iru
They Were Eleven!
Było ich jedenaścioro
¿Quién es el 11º pasajero?
Nous sommes onze !
synopsis: They Were 11 is about ten Galactic University recruits who have passed many levels only to be given one final test. They are told to travel to an ancient spaceship and live there, together, for fifty-three days. This is not a problem until the ten recruits, hailing from diverse backgrounds and planets, discover that there are actually eleven of them on the ship. In fact, this problem turns out to be the test, as they have to trust each other in order to survive, even though one of them is an impostor. (Source: VIZ Media) Note: Won the 21st Shogakukan Manga Award for Shoujo in 1975.

synopsis: The middle-aged man and airsoft enthusiast Daisuke Koga is summoned to a different world on his 40th birthday. Given the ability to turn airsoft guns into real guns, Daisuke must save the other world while traveling back and forth between reality and the fantasy world. Alongside female swordsman Rena, Daisuke becomes the only gun user and dominates in the fantasy world after work! (Source: Houbunsha, translated)

titleNative: 悪役令嬢と悪役令息が、出逢って恋に落ちたなら　～名無しの精霊と契約して追い出された令嬢は、今日も令息と競い合っているようです～

악역 영애와 악역 영식이 만나서 사랑에 빠지면
synopsis: Contracted with a no-name spirit, Brigitte Meidell is a disappointment to her noble family and the mockery of her peers at the Otoleanna Academy of Magic—except for one. Yuri Aurealis is intelligent, handsome…and oh so arrogant. He’s made enemies of the same people as Brigitte, meaning the two should get along just fine. However, his boorishness accidentally sparks a rivalry between them. It’s a competition that has the potential to bring the two closer than they ever thought…! (Source: Yen Press)

title: The Hero and the Sage, Reincarnated and Engaged
titleRomaji: Eiyuu to Kenja no Tensei Kon: Katsute no Koutekishu to Konyakushite Saikyou Fuufu ni Narimashita
titleEnglish: The Hero and the Sage, Reincarnated and Engaged
titleNative: 英雄と賢者の転生婚～かつての好敵手と婚約して最強夫婦になりました～
synonyms: The Reincarnated Marriage of a Hero and Sage
The Reincarnated Marriage of a Hero and Sage: After Becoming Engaged to a Former Rival, We Became the Strongest Couple
synopsis: With their nations in conflict, the Hero Reid and the Sage Elria had long been on opposing sides of the battlefield. However, it would all come to a much too sudden end with the Sage's passing. Single-handedly breaking through the enemy ranks to see Elria one last time, Reid meets his own heroic demise... But then, he opens his eyes as a newborn a thousand years later, getting another chance at life…and love?! (Source: Manga UP! Global)

tags.name: Magic
tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Reincarnation
tags.description: Features a character being born again after death, typically as another person or in another world.

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.
